x-enumeration-literals.name: Operational Report
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Report tracking the day-to-day operations of partners and their transactions with the bank.

Comment:
Examples:
Daily report of ATM cash replenishment handled by a service partner

Transactions processed by a remittance partner

Weekly mobile wallet transaction reconciliation

x-enumeration-literals.name: Issue Resolution Report
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Report detailing problems, disputes, or service interruptions involving partners.

Comment:
Examples:
Technical outage of a payment gateway reported by the partner

Dispute over incorrect commission calculation

Delayed transaction processing escalations

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Report
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Report focused on financial transactions, settlements, and reconciliations with partners.

Comment:
Examples:
Monthly commission statement for insurance agents

Reconciliation report for fund transfer service providers

Payment summary for card processing partners

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Report
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Report tracking partners adherence to banking regulations, internal policies, and contractual obligations.

Comment:
Examples:
Partner KYC verification status report

Quarterly audit compliance report for correspondent banks

Regulatory compliance checklist for third-party fintech integrations

x-enumeration-literals.name: Performance Report
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Report evaluating the performance of partners against agreed KPIs or SLAs.

Comment:
Examples:
Monthly transaction volume report of remittance agents

SLA performance report for ATM network vendors

Partner onboarding and customer acquisition report

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partner Satisfaction Report
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Report assessing partner engagement, satisfaction, and collaboration quality.

Comment:
Examples:
Partner satisfaction survey results

Quarterly meeting summary with top-performing branch agents

Complaints raised by partners and their resolution status

x-enumeration-literals.name: Executive Report
x-enumeration-literals.description:
High-level report summarizing partner activities for management or strategic decision-making.

Comment:
Examples:
Annual partner performance dashboard for senior management

Risk analysis report of underperforming correspondent banks

Strategic growth report for fintech collaborations
